message:
test(conformance): un-ignore 103 passing extension conformance tests (bd-15jg)

103 conformance tests were marked #[ignore] but now pass after runtime
improvements (Phase 4/5 work, module shims, API additions). Removed
ignore annotations from all passing tests across Tiers 1-5.

Before: 65 non-ignored tests, 141 ignored
After:  172 non-ignored tests, 38 ignored (genuine failures)

The 38 remaining ignored tests fail due to:
- 24 load failures (npm dependencies, multi-file extensions)
- 11 manifest command name mismatches
- 3 manifest tool registration mismatches

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
